item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly refuses adding another downstream manual confirmer, identifies the repeated pattern of prior manual gates, moves the issue upstream to identity/location/barcode/batch control and ownership, and proposes a source-control review with a front-loaded admission control point.
